Footer.aboutDescription: This music streaming bubble web app is a personal web application project created to demonstrate TypeScript, React, and Next.js. It is designed with a simple and user-friendly interface that allows users to listen to music, save songs, and even listen together with others.
Footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ Disclaimer - This project is a non-commercial personal demonstration project. I do not own or claim copyright for any songs or images stored or used in this application. All media content is used strictly for demonstration purposes. I only own the source code written for this project.
Footer.contactDescription: I am currently looking for new opportunities.
Footer.demoNote: This project was created for demonstration purposes only.

Auth.signUpSuccessContent: Sign-up successful! Please check your email to confirm your account. If you don’t see it, check your spam folder.

default.title: Bubble
default.description: Bubble is the music streaming platform where user can listen their favorite songs at their own control.

searchPage.title: Search For {query}
searchPage.description: Are you looking for something? Find songs , albums , artists and playlists you loved in Bubble

explorePage.title: Explore
explorePage.description: Explore the newly added fresh songs for you. Don’t miss the newest releases right now in Bubble

moodPage.title: {mood} Mood
moodPage.description: Enjoy the {mood} Mood songs for you in Bubble

genrePage.title: {genre} Genre
genrePage.description: Enjoy the {genre} Genre songs for you in Bubble

albumPage.title: {album} - album
albumPage.description: Listen now album called {album} by {artistName} in Bubble

trackPage.title: {track} - track
trackPage.description: Listen the song called {track} in Bubble

playlistPage.title: {playlist} - playlist
playlistPage.description: Listen the playlist called {playlist} in Bubble

libraryPage.title: Library
libraryPage.description: Your own Library of music in Bubble

profilePage.title: {name}
profilePage.description: Check this {name} profile page in Bubble

likedSongPage.title: Liked Track
likedSongPage.description: Your favourite songs playlist in Bubble

profilePlaylist.title: Playlists
profilePlaylist.description: Listen the created playlists in bubble

authLogin.title: Log in
authLogin.description: Log in to your Bubble account and enjoy creating your personalized music world.

authSignup.title: Sign up
authSignup.description: Create your new Bubble account and enjoy building your personalized music world.

authConfirm.title: Verify Account
authConfirm.description: Verify your account using the confirmation link sent to your email.
